summary: End-to-end test lifecycle: detect framework, gap-analyse against requirements, author user-behavior-first tests, run until green.

scripts.purpose: Detect Playwright, Cypress, WebdriverIO, E2E scripts, configs, test directories, and result hints.
Detect e2e runner, config paths, existing tests, and app entrypoints.
Map R-XXXX requirements to tagged feature scenarios and surface missing or orphaned coverage.
Lint E2E tests for fixed waits, CSS selectors, DOM-language Gherkin, and missing requirement tags.
Parse JUnit XML and Playwright JSON reports into pass/fail summaries for diagnosis.
Reject low-value scenarios and specs that lack user action, downstream outcome, or real assertions.
Probe a running app with Playwright and emit headings, buttons, labels, links, and data attributes.

signals: framework detected before any code is written
tests map to user journeys and acceptance criteria
